HSFFI.Title: HolySheet
HSFFI.Subtitle: Player helper
HSFFI.Dock.Label: Holysheet shortcuts
HSFFI.Shortcuts.SkillsHint: Open your character sheet on the skills tab
HSFFI.Shortcuts.InventoryHint: Open your character sheet on the inventory tab
HSFFI.CharacterMenu.Title: Choose a character
HSFFI.Messages.NoCharacters: No accessible character found for your user.
HSFFI.Modules.Title: Module shortcuts
HSFFI.Modules.Empty: No module sidebar tabs detected yet.
HSFFI.Settings.Mode.Name: Interface profile
HSFFI.Settings.Mode.Hint: Enable or disable Holysheet helper shortcuts for players. GMs keep the classic Foundry interface.
HSFFI.Settings.showCharacterShortcut.Hin: Adds a button that opens the player's character sheet directly.
HSFFI.Settings.showNotesShortcut.Name: Show Notes shortcut
HSFFI.Settings.showNotesShortcut.Hint: Adds a button that opens notes.
HSFFI.Settings.showChatShortcut.Name: Show Chat shortcut
HSFFI.Settings.showChatShortcut.Hint: Adds a button that opens chat.
HSFFI.Settings.shortcutPreset.Name: Shortcut style
HSFFI.Settings.shortcutPreset.Hint: Vanilla keeps the three simple shortcuts. Holysheet adds advanced character shortcuts.
HSFFI.Settings.showActors.Name: Show Actors button
HSFFI.Settings.showActors.Hint: Adds a large shortcut to the Actors tab.
HSFFI.Settings.showChat.Name: Show Chat button
HSFFI.Settings.showJournal.Name: Show Journals button
HSFFI.Settings.showJournal.Hint: Adds a large shortcut to the Journals tab.
HSFFI.Settings.showCombat.Name: Show Combat button
HSFFI.Settings.showCombat.Hint: Adds a shortcut to the combat tracker.
HSFFI.Settings.showMacros.Name: Show Macros button
HSFFI.Settings.showMacros.Hint: Adds a shortcut to macros if the tab exists in the world.
HSFFI.Settings.showRollTables.Name: Show Roll Tables button
HSFFI.Settings.showRollTables.Hint: Adds a shortcut to roll tables.
HSFFI.Settings.showModules.Name: Show Modules button
HSFFI.Settings.showModules.Hint: Shows a section that groups sidebar tabs added by other modules when they are detectable.
HSFFI.Settings.allowTemporaryVanilla.Hin: Allows players to freely return to the classic Foundry interface until the next refresh.
HSFFI.Settings.hideSceneNavigation.Name: Hide scene navigation
HSFFI.Settings.hideSceneNavigation.Hint: Hides the top scene navigation for players in Immersive mode.
HSFFI.Settings.restyleChat.Name: Restyle chat
HSFFI.Settings.restyleChat.Hint: Applies the Holysheet style to chat while keeping Foundry behavior.
